rules: Valuta sulla base di come il testo trasmette il contatto con le superfici: scivolamento vs resistenza
LISCIO evoca continuità, scorrimento, assenza di attrito, fluidità; RUVIDO evoca ostacolo, cattura, microresistenza
Distingui effetto semantico (atmosfera, ritmo del testo) da lessicale (parole dirette)
Un punteggio 5 richiede che la qualità tattile emerga senza nominare il concetto
prompt_trace: Describe the sensation of moving through a space without touching anything.
Write about a surface that reveals itself only when touched.
Describe the experience of running your hand along something in the dark.
Write about an object whose outside tells a different story from its inside.
Describe what it feels like to move through a crowd.
Write about a material that changes quality depending on how fast you move.
Describe the sensation of contact between two things that should not touch.
Write about a path that resists or invites movement.
Describe the feeling of a hand that has been held for a long time.
Write about an object that feels different each time you return to it.
Describe what remains on the skin after contact with something.
Write about a transition between two different kinds of material.
